reviews.review_description: Am days deep into this and really enjoying the adventure. One of those made with love and care. The dev is super helpful on discord when I occasionally get stuck. A no-brainer for $5 if you like these kind of quest-laden games. Chat to folk, scavenge items and fight wolves in an open exploration world that you can also circumnavigate by boat.

This is a fun, atmospheric, good looking RPG with a cool viking environment and witty dialogue. It provides hours of entertainment for the cost of two bars of chocolate! The graphics are as good as a Quest 2 game can get, and the relative lack of polygons actually works well with the rough viking settlement style.
